name: Box
summary: Represents the value of a plane and three intervals in an orthogonal, oriented box that is not necessarily parallel to the world Y, X, Z axes.

constructors.name: Box(BoundingBox)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new Box that mimics a BoundingBox struct. The orientation plane of the Box is coincident with the World XY plane.

constructors.name: Box(Plane, BoundingBox)
constructors.summary: Initializes a world aligned box from a base plane and a bounding box.

constructors.name: Box(Plane, GeometryBase)
constructors.summary: Initializes a box that contains a generic piece of geometry. This box will be aligned with an arbitrary plane.

params.name: basePlane
params.doc: Base plane for aligned bounding box.

constructors.name: Box(Plane, IEnumerable<Point3d>)
constructors.summary: Initializes the smallest box that contains a set of points.

params.name: points
params.doc: Points to include, Invalid points will be ignored.

constructors.name: Box(Plane, Interval, Interval, Interval)
constructors.signature: public Box(Plane basePlane, Interval xSize, Interval ySize, Interval zSize)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new box from a base Plane and three Intervals.

params.name: xSize
params.doc: Dimensions along the base plane X-Axis.

params.name: ySize
params.doc: Dimensions along the base plane Y-Axis.

params.name: zSize
params.doc: Dimensions along the base plane Z-Axis.

methods.name: ClosestPoint
methods.summary: Finds the closest point on or in the Box. The box should be Valid for this to work.

returns.doc: The point on or in the box that is closest to the sample point.

methods.name: Contains(BoundingBox)
methods.summary: Test a bounding box for Box inclusion. This is the same as calling Contains(box,false)

returns.doc: true if the box is on the inside of or coincident with this Box.

methods.name: Contains(Box)
methods.summary: Test a box for Box inclusion. This is the same as calling Contains(box,false)

returns.doc: true if the box is on the inside of or coincident with this Box.

methods.name: Contains(Point3d)
methods.summary: Determines whether a point is included in this box. This is the same as calling Contains(point,false)

returns.doc: true if the point is on the inside of or coincident with this Box.

methods.name: Contains(BoundingBox, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Contains(BoundingBox box, bool strict)
methods.summary: Test a bounding box for Box inclusion.

params.name: strict
params.doc: If true, the bounding box needs to be fully on the inside of this Box. I.e. coincident boxes will be considered 'outside'.

returns.doc: true if the box is (strictly) on the inside of this Box.

methods.name: Contains(Box, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Contains(Box box, bool strict)
methods.summary: Test a box for Box inclusion.

params.name: strict
params.doc: If true, the box needs to be fully on the inside of this Box. I.e. coincident boxes will be considered 'outside'.

returns.doc: true if the box is (strictly) on the inside of this Box.

methods.name: Contains(Point3d, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Contains(Point3d point, bool strict)
methods.summary: Determines whether a point is included in this box.

params.name: strict
params.doc: If true, the point needs to be fully on the inside of the Box. I.e. coincident points will be considered 'outside'.

returns.doc: true if the point is (strictly) on the inside of this Box.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Box other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

methods.name: FurthestPoint
methods.summary: Finds the furthest point on the Box. The Box should be Valid for this to work properly.

returns.doc: The point on the box that is furthest from the sample point.

methods.name: GetCorners
methods.summary: Gets an array of the 8 corner points of this box.

methods.name: Inflate(Double)
methods.summary: Inflates the box by a given offset in each direction. Inflating with negative amounts may result in decreasing boxes. InValid boxes cannot be inflated.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in all directions.

methods.name: Inflate(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public void Inflate(double xAmount, double yAmount, double zAmount)
methods.summary: Inflates the box by a given offset in each direction. Inflating with negative amounts may result in decreasing boxes. InValid boxes cannot be inflated.

params.name: xAmount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in the x direction.

params.name: yAmount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in the y direction.

params.name: zAmount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in the z direction.

methods.name: MakeValid
methods.summary: Attempts to make the Box valid. This is not always possible.

returns.doc: true if the box was made valid, or if it was valid to begin with. false if the box remains unchanged.

methods.name: PointAt
methods.signature: public Point3d PointAt(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Evaluates the box volume at the given unitized parameters. The box has idealized side length of 1x1x1.

params.name: x
params.doc: Unitized parameter (between 0 and 1 is inside the box) along box X direction.

params.name: y
params.doc: Unitized parameter (between 0 and 1 is inside the box) along box Y direction.

params.name: z
params.doc: Unitized parameter (between 0 and 1 is inside the box) along box Z direction.

methods.name: RepositionBasePlane
methods.summary: Repositions the origin of the Base plane for this box without affecting the physical dimensions.

methods.name: ToBrep
methods.summary: Constructs a brep representation of this box.

returns.doc: A Brep representation of this box or null.

methods.name: ToExtrusion
methods.summary: Constructs an extrusion representation of this box.

returns.doc: An Extrusion representation of this box or null.

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transforms this Box using a Transformation matrix. If the Transform does not preserve Similarity, the dimensions of the resulting box cannot be trusted.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transformation matrix to apply to this Box.

returns.doc: true if the Box was successfully transformed, false if otherwise.

methods.name: Union
methods.summary: Constructs a union between this Box and the given point. This grows the box in directions so it contains the point.

properties.name: Area
properties.summary: Gets the total surface area of this box.

properties.name: BoundingBox
properties.summary: Gets the world axis aligned Bounding box for this oriented box.

properties.name: Center
properties.summary: Gets the point that is in the center of the box.

properties.name: Empty
properties.summary: Empty Box. Empty boxes are considered to be invalid.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets the validity of this Box. Boxes are invalid when the base plane or any of the dimension intervals are invalid or decreasing.

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Gets or sets the orientation plane for this Box.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets a Box whose base plane and axis dimensions are all Unset.

properties.name: Volume
properties.summary: Gets the total volume of this box.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Interval that describes the dimension of the Box along the orientation plane X-Axis. Otherwise known as the Width of the Box.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Interval that describes the dimension of the Box along the orientation plane Y-Axis. Otherwise known as the Depth of the Box.

properties.name: Z
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Interval that describes the dimension of the Box along the orientation plane Z-Axis. Otherwise known as the Height of the Box.
